description: validate a card context JSON against the required schema and deterministically render the markdown card from the Jinja template
rules: render is deterministic: identical context JSON always yields an identical card
the context is validated for required SHAPE (keys/types/enums) before rendering, NOT for legal/safety correctness of values
the rendered card is a DRAFT — a human owner must review it; this tool never signs, publishes, or approves
writes only the rendered card (and a render log) to record_store; never mutates any source skill
usage: Set CONTEXT to the path of a context JSON authored from discovery signals (or leave unset to read ${record_store}/context.json). Output: skill-card.md rendered from the vendored references/skill-card.md.j2 template and catalogs. Requires jinja2; if absent or the context is missing the porter degrades gracefully and writes a note to render_card.log.
limitation: Requires jinja2. The renderer validates required context shape only, not the truthfulness of field values. Canned limitation/risk catalogs are starting points; prune entries that do not apply during human review.
